MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marissa M. Tirona, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON 925/932-2468, for defendant The Bubble Lounge San Francisco, Inc., moving for dismissal and to compel arbitration and to stay action pending arbitration
R. Michael Hoffman, Esq., 362-1111, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled on DEFENDANT THE BUBBLE LOUNGE SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Mo For Dismissal And To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration. MOTION TO DISMISS the declaratory relief action is granted and the remaining actions are DENIED. GRANTED as motion TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
